examples: The entire business had been going down the Swanee.
Ralph sings, Norton plays "Swanee River" and then "Melancholy Serenade" fast tempo.
Postgate and another actor did their voices with Swanee whistles, after Postgate had painstakingly written out every word of the script.
Take me to that good old Swanee shore.
Ms. AUSTIN: (Singing) Swanee, how I love you.
